Title: Soft Tip Blind Draw
Description: Open soft tip blind draw — all skill levels welcome. Show up solo or with friends, get paired on the night.

Title: Steel Tip Blind Draw
Description: Weekly steel tip blind draw. Random partner draw, round robin format. Great way to meet other players.

Title: B League Matches — Week 9
Description: Regular season B League matches. Check the schedule for your team's venue this week.

Title: A League Matches — Week 9
Description: Regular season A League matches. Check the schedule for your team's venue this week.

Title: Spring Open Singles Championship
Description: Annual open singles tournament — steel tip. Open to all SCCDA members and invited guests. Format: round robin into playoffs. Cash prizes for top 3.

Title: New Member Night
Description: Thinking about joining the league? Come meet the teams, try the boards, and get a feel for how SCCDA nights run. No experience necessary.

Title: Doubles Invitational
Description: Two-person team format, steel tip. Teams must have one player from each league (A + B). Random draw for partners available on the night for solo entries.

Title: Spring League Finals
Description: End of season championship matches. Top 4 teams from each division compete for the Spring 2026 title.
